---
title: "Cheat Sheets"
description: "Your go-to quick reference guide for Python, Rust, Swift, JavaScript, Kotlin, Go, Git, and 50+ more languages and tools"
mode: "custom"
---

<div className="relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0f1117] via-[#1a1d27] to-[#0f1117] dark:bg-gradient-to-br dark:from-[#0f1117] dark:via-[#1a1d27] dark:to-[#0f1117] py-20">
  <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')] opacity-40"></div>
  
  <div className="relative max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6">
    <div className="text-center space-y-8">
      <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white/5 dark:bg-white/5 border border-white/10 dark:border-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm">
        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-300 dark:text-gray-300">50+ Programming Languages & Tools</span>
      </div>
      
      <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold text-white dark:text-white leading-tight">
        Developer Cheat Sheets<br/>
        <span className="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-[#94cb04] to-[#7aa503]">At Your Fingertips</span>
      </h1>
      
      <p className="text-xl text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-400 max-w-3xl mx-auto leading-relaxed">
        Quick reference guides for Python, Rust, Swift, JavaScript, Kotlin, Go, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, and more. Available as a beautiful mobile app for Android and iOS.
      </p>
      
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-4 pt-4">
        <a 
          href="/installation" 
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-8 py-4 rounded-lg bg-[#94cb04] hover:bg-[#7aa503] text-gray-900 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 transform hover:scale-105 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl no-underline"
        >
          <span>Get Started</span>
          <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M13 7l5 5m0 0l-5 5m5-5H6" />
          </svg>
        </a>
        <a 
          href="/cheatsheets/python" 
          className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-8 py-4 rounded-lg bg-white/10 dark:bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 dark:hover:bg-white/20 text-white border border-white/20 dark:border-white/20 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 backdrop-blur-sm no-underline"
        >
          <span>Browse Cheat Sheets</span>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div className="mt-16 mb-16 max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6">
  <div className="text-center mb-12">
    <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4">Quick start</h2>
    <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 max-w-2xl mx-auto">Get up and running with Cheat Sheets in minutes</p>
  </div>

  <Steps>
    <Step title="Download the app">
      Install Cheat Sheets on your device from Google Play (Android) or AltStore (iOS). You can also download APK/IPA files directly from GitHub releases.
      
      <CardGroup cols={2}>
        <Card title="Android" icon="android" href="https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ivansaul.cheatsheets">
          Download from Google Play Store
        </Card>
        <Card title="iOS" icon="apple" href="https://tinyurl.com/ivansaulAltstore">
          Install via AltStore
        </Card>
      </CardGroup>
    </Step>
    
    <Step title="Browse cheat sheets">
      Open the app and explore 50+ programming languages and tools. Search for specific topics or browse by category including Programming, Tools, Frameworks, and Databases.
      
      <Note>
        All content is optimized for mobile viewing with syntax highlighting and easy-to-read formatting.
      </Note>
    </Step>
    
    <Step title="Start coding">
      Reference the cheat sheets while you code. Copy code snippets, learn syntax, and boost your productivity with quick access to essential information.
    </Step>
  </Steps>
</div>

<div className="mt-24 mb-16 max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6">
  <div className="text-center mb-12">
    <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4">Explore by topic</h2>
    <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Find what you need quickly</p>
  </div>

  <CardGroup cols={2}>
    <Card title="Programming Languages" icon="code" href="/cheatsheets/python">
      Python, Rust, Swift, JavaScript, Kotlin, Go, Java, C++, C, Ruby, Dart, and more
    </Card>
    <Card title="Tools & Frameworks" icon="wrench" href="/cheatsheets/git">
      Git, Docker, Kubernetes, React, Flutter, Django, Express, and more
    </Card>
    <Card title="Installation Guide" icon="download" href="/installation">
      Step-by-step installation instructions for Android and iOS
    </Card>
    <Card title="Build from Source" icon="hammer" href="/building-from-source">
      Compile the app yourself with Flutter and contribute to the project
    </Card>
  </CardGroup>
</div>

<div className="mt-24 mb-16 max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6">
  <div className="text-center mb-12">
    <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4">Popular cheat sheets</h2>
    <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Most referenced languages and tools</p>
  </div>

  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
    <a href="/cheatsheets/python" className="group block rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-[#27272a] bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] overflow-hidden hover:border-[#94cb04] dark:hover:border-[#94cb04] transition-all duration-200 no-underline">
      <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-[#3776ab]/10 dark:bg-[#3776ab]/20 flex items-center justify-center">

          </div>
          <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">Python</h3>
        </div>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
          Quick reference for Python syntax, data types, functions, and common operations
        </p>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-500 group-hover:text-[#94cb04] dark:group-hover:text-[#94cb04] transition-colors">
          <span>View cheat sheet</span>
          <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>

          </div>
          <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">Rust</h3>
        </div>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
          Essential Rust syntax, ownership, borrowing, and memory safety concepts
        </p>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-500 group-hover:text-[#94cb04] dark:group-hover:text-[#94cb04] transition-colors">
          <span>View cheat sheet</span>
          <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="/cheatsheets/javascript" className="group block rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-[#27272a] bg-white dark:bg-[#1a1d27] overflow-hidden hover:border-[#94cb04] dark:hover:border-[#94cb04] transition-all duration-200 no-underline">
      <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-[#f7df1e]/10 dark:bg-[#f7df1e]/20 flex items-center justify-center">
            <svg className="w-6 h-6 text-[#f7df1e]" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M0 0h24v24H0V0zm22.034 18.276c-.175-1.095-.888-2.015-3.003-2.873-.736-.345-1.554-.585-1.797-1.14-.091-.33-.105-.51-.046-.705.15-.646.915-.84 1.515-.66.39.12.75.42.976.9 1.034-.676 1.034-.676 1.755-1.125-.27-.42-.404-.601-.586-.78-.63-.705-1.469-1.065-2.834-1.034l-.705.089c-.676.165-1.32.525-1.71 1.005-1.14 1.291-.811 3.541.569 4.471 1.365 1.02 3.361 1.244 3.616 2.205.24 1.17-.87 1.545-1.966 1.41-.811-.18-1.26-.586-1.755-1.336l-1.83 1.051c.21.48.45.689.81 1.109 1.74 1.756 6.09 1.666 6.871-1.004.029-.09.24-.705.074-1.65l.046.067zm-8.983-7.245h-2.248c0 1.938-.009 3.864-.009 5.805 0 1.232.063 2.363-.138 2.711-.33.689-1.18.601-1.566.48-.396-.196-.597-.466-.83-.855-.063-.105-.11-.196-.127-.196l-1.825 1.125c.305.63.75 1.172 1.324 1.517.855.51 2.004.675 3.207.405.783-.226 1.458-.691 1.811-1.411.51-.93.402-2.07.397-3.346.012-2.054 0-4.109 0-6.179l.004-.056z"/></svg>
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-gray-900 dark:text-white">JavaScript</h3>
        </div>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
          Modern JavaScript features, ES6+ syntax, and common patterns
        </p>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-500 group-hover:text-[#94cb04] dark:group-hover:text-[#94cb04] transition-colors">
          <span>View cheat sheet</span>
          <svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
            <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div className="mt-24 mb-16 max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6">
  <div className="text-center mb-12">
    <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4">Community & support</h2>
    <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">Get help and contribute to the project</p>
  </div>

  <CardGroup cols={2}>
    <Card title="Join Discord" icon="discord" href="https://discord.gg/tDvybtJ7y9">
      Connect with other developers and get support from the community
    </Card>
    <Card title="Contribute" icon="github" href="/community/contributing">
      Help improve Cheat Sheets by contributing code, documentation, or cheat sheets
    </Card>
    <Card title="Report Issues" icon="bug" href="https://github.com/ivansaul/cheat-sheets/issues">
      Found a bug or have a feature request? Let us know on GitHub
    </Card>
    <Card title="Changelog" icon="clock" href="/community/changelog">
      See what's new in the latest release and track upcoming features
    </Card>
  </CardGroup>
</div>

<div className="mt-24 mb-16 max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6">
  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-[#27272a] bg-gradient-to-br from-[#94cb04]/5 to-[#7aa503]/5 dark:from-[#94cb04]/10 dark:to-[#7aa503]/10 p-12 text-center">
    <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white mb-4">
      Ready to get started?
    </h2>
    <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mb-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
      Download Cheat Sheets today and have instant access to 50+ programming language and tool references on your mobile device.
    </p>
    <a 
      href="/installation" 
      className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-8 py-4 rounded-lg bg-[#94cb04] hover:bg-[#7aa503] text-gray-900 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 transform hover:scale-105 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl no-underline"
    >
      <span>Install Now</span>
      <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
        <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M13 7l5 5m0 0l-5 5m5-5H6" />
      </svg>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
